name: Layered Hamburger Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, sliced into rings and separated
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beef with egg, bread crumbs, salt, herbs, mustard, cumin, and garlic powder.
2. Pat the mixture evenly into a 9-inch pie pan to form a crust.
3. Fill the crust with a layer of potatoes, onion, and mushrooms, reserving some mushrooms for the top ring of the pie.
4. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until the potatoes are done.
5. Remove from the oven and remove the foil.
6. Top with cheese and sprinkle with parsley.
7. Return to the oven just long enough to melt the cheese.
